item.title: That's a Lively Take on This Photo
item.dc:creator: TaurionPhoenix

item.title: Smokey bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
We're on our way to see Connor Price! I drew this for our 9 year old. I can't wait to see my kiddo starstruck. He knows every word to every song. Tonight is going to be a core memory!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax to help celebrate #caturday
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: It's yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
not the worst i've seen. greetings online friends
i don't have a kid but i used to be one so i can relate
needs no explanation
as is tradition
don't see that every day, or maybe you do, i dunno
that's a big-ass ginger ale, ma'am
they'll never know
dude.. oversharing
cool artwork
sometimes i post a meme again intentionally (bc i like it so much), sometimes i just completely forget i ever posted it
a new twist on a classic
mmm hmm
squeggs
yes
even when you get home from the SLEEPING FACTORY??
one of my favorite bands
show cows
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I never heard of him...and fuck, I think he deserves to be remembered!
item.description: https://www.irishtimes.com/life-and-style/people/richard-green-obituary-psychiatrist-lawyer-and-lgbt-rights-trailblazer-1.3864553 It's an old story, but what he did was amazing and I think people should know about him!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1182 (Discworld theme dump)
item.description:
A while back, probably about 6 months ago, someone asked, "Hey, can you do a Discworld Themed Dump?" At the time, I said no. But I started saving up every Discworld Meme I found anyway. And now, person whose username I can not recall... this is for you. Well, and for everyone who likes Discworld. 48 Discworld memes, and that's cutting me own throat. Let's go down to the Dwarven bread museum.
For the record: yes, you should read Discworld. No, it really doesn't matter where you start, though I would personally recommend beginning with one of the stand-alone books like Pyramids, Small Gods, or The Truth.
Are you Trans? Concerned about Trans appearances in fiction? Cheery Littlebottom may be the character just for you. This Dwarf appears in the City Watch series. Leaving the whole thing deliberately vague for you to discover, my partners in creation. Sir Terry was "woke" before "woke" was really a thing.
The Discworld may also contain the ONE exception to ACAB, in the form of Captain Carrot This is not Captain Carrot. This is Sam Vimes. He *absolutely* knows he's a bastard. He's the other major subversion to the trope.
I envy everyone who discovers The Discworld for the first time.
Mort is another good starting point.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Cody. Come here. I love you." (Silly cooing noises)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Vaulting across the canal
item.description: Fierljeppen (West-Frisian compound of fier—"far" and ljeppen—"leaping") or polsstokverspringen is a traditional sport of the West Frisian people in the Dutch province of Fryslân. The sport is nowadays also popular in the province of Utrecht which produced record holder Jaco de Groot. Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fierljeppen
item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.description: but that can also be said about most things... professional sports, vegetarianism, yu-gi-oh, anime, video games... I love most of those, but it takes more than 1 piece to make a puzzle people...

item.title: Images of Note: Stop your pooping
item.description:
https://youtu.be/dbJABjVH-0k
mood
Wasn't a waterproof suit a James Bond thing.
BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE
We don't have Carl's Jr here but yeah this looks like something you'd eat to stop pooping.
Freedom is where you blindly praise the state!
"They beat Jesus with that" is what I am going to say about everything that can be used as a flail.
Their business was a meme-creating AI that somehow predicted the future.
All hail.
it is not wimdy rn but it fuckin rainy.
Thank you, lax safety standards in Birmingham factories.
If you can make an Afrikaner go "wot de fook" at your colonial era crimes, you need to look at yourself in the mirror.
Truly a flag to be proud of.
I say this as someone on the spectrum but fuck that car, it's infantalising and the puzzle piece is an Autism Speaks symbol, and fuck Autism Speaks.
The farmer in Stardew Valley is a Cryptid.
That cat has seen another cat.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.dc:creator: dennyson

item.title: I'm a little pissed
item.description: Most Viral Edit: Holy shit guys! You really won't let a screaming into the void just dissappear into the abyss of usersub will you! Okay. Here's some context. Wife has Rheumatoid Arthritis and it's pretty bad. (Not old person joints wearing out Arthritis, this is the autoimmune body attacking itself type.) She has a slew of other problems but that's the main one. According to her, alcohol really relieves pain in ways that other pain killers don't. The problem is, she becomes a very different person when she's drunk and no one in the family likes what she turns into. The thing about not feeding the kids isn't nearly as bad as it sounds. They are both teenagers and even though one is Autistic and the other has other diagnosed disorders, they are more than capable of taking care of themselves. What bothered me most was that this type of thing has happened several times before and she had every intention of trying to hide it. She also knew that my trip with my mom and extended family was going to be stressful for me and throughout the day even assured me that once I got home I could relax and everything would be ok. In summary (TLDR) I know we all have our vices and problems. God knows I've got mine. What really bothers me is she knows this is a problem but won't accept help and refuses to admit it. Lastly, no I'm not giving up on her. I don't give up on people. Our relationship isn't great (and there are several reasons for that) but I still made a promise and I take promises very seriously. At this point I don't know what the future holds but for right now I'm holding together as much as I can for the sake of my kids.
item.dc:creator: OnlyByMoonlight

item.title: Two Major Landmarks for an Aging Actor
item.description:
I do not love anime, but I do love anime fans. A viewership as passionate as that helps bring a sense of validation to a struggling actor. It makes the work sweeter.
I practice a particular kind of stupidity that I suspect may be most common amongst white American men: I eat healthy, and exercise regularly, but still indulge in an excess of alcohol and tobacco. Ah, well. Time to make an appointment with the cardiologist. And, yknow, quit smoking.
item.dc:creator: MrBlueSands
